title: Signal Distribution Layer (Extract → Registry → WebSocket Broadcast)
summary: Three-layer signal pipeline for multi-account: (1) Extract — separate signal generation from execution in bot.py; scan loop produces typed Signal objects (symbol, direction, score, rationale). (2) Registry — brain maintains per-user favourite symbol subscriptions beyond standard scan universe. (3) Broadcast — brain publishes every Signal to all connected user containers in real time via WebSocket, with sequence number for reliable delivery.
approach: Create signal_types.py with a Signal dataclass. Refactor the scan loop in bot.py so each scored opportunity is wrapped in a Signal and appended to a signals list. Remove all direct order calls from the scan loop — execution will live entirely in AccountDecisionAgent. Add unit tests for Signal construction and field validation.
